content.en:
"What's the matter?"

The attitude of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was very good, and there was no dissatisfaction.

If other extradimensional realms dared to disturb his sleep, he would directly kill him.

But he still had to count on Ye Tian to rescue him, so naturally he wouldn't be angry with Ye Tian.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, my progress in extradimensional rules is very slow, where is there a place that can help me quickly comprehend extradimensional rules?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon was speechless, not long after Ye Tiancai broke through to the third realm, he disliked the slow progress of the extradimensional rules.

He knew very well that he had given Ye Tian the imitation of the multidimensional treasure bottle, even if it was not of much help to the third realm, but if he practiced with the help of the essence of the imitation of the three realms multidimensional rules, it would be of a little use, at least much faster than the other third realms to comprehend the transcendent rules.

In this way, you should be satisfied, relying on the long and endless years to improve the extra-dimensional rules, this is the real way of cultivation, how can you easily improve the extra-dimensional rules quickly!

However, Ye Tian wanted to improve the extradimensional rules, but also to improve his strength, and if he wanted to be promoted to the fourth realm faster, he naturally wanted to help with all his might.

Immediately, he carefully recalled.

Soon, he thought of a place.

"Ye Tian, if you want to quickly improve the realm of extradimensional rules, and it is useful to you now, in addition to obtaining the multidimensional rule vase, you can only go to that place. "Tricky Wood Red Dragon Road.

"Where?"

Ye Tian was full of expectations.

"Nine Swords Cliff!"

"The Nine Swords Cliff is located in the Five Thousand and One Territory, which has been occupied by multiple forces, and this place was just a treasure land with rich energy before the endless years, and it has no use to assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules. However, there was an existence of the Fourth Realm who failed to attack the Fifth Realm here, and by coincidence, the Nine Swords Cliff was created into such a special treasure land. And the fallen Fourth Realm is a legend of the Fifth Frontier, who can be called the invincible Nine Sword Realm Lord of the Fourth Realm, and it is said that no Fourth Realm can catch his sword. "

"Nine Sword Realm Master!"

Ye Tian hadn't heard of this, presumably because the other party had fallen for too long, and the years of existence were too far away, and after the fall, no one paid attention to it, so there was no information about the other party.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, you also said that the Nine Sword Cliff is occupied by those forces, how can I enter? There must be places in the Five Thousand Territory that can assist in comprehending the rules of the outer dimension, and there must be a lot of similar treasures, but I can't use them, it's useless!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

Tricky Wood Chilong smiled and said, "I will say this method, naturally you have hope of entering the Nine Sword Cliff!"

"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon took a huge mouth and spit out a token: "This is a token of the Nine Swords Realm Lord, the power of the Nine Swords Realm Lord has long been destroyed, but he has accepted many disciples, and now some disciples are still alive, one of them left the Five Thousand Territory and entered a broader territory, and that one's strength is also the Fourth Realm." Therefore, this token is still somewhat useful, you say that you are the descendant of the Lord of the Nine Swords Realm, those forces should give you face and let you enter the Nine Swords Cliff for a period of time. "

As he spoke, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon gave this Nine Sword Token to Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian didn't talk about this matter today, Yumu Chilong wouldn't even be able to think of it.

It had been a long time since he had obtained this token, but for the Fourth Realm, this thing was useless at all, and it could only allow Ye Tian to try to blend into the Nine Sword Cliff and improve the realm of extradimensional rules, which was not very useful.

"Thank you, Senior Slim Red Dragon!"

Ye Tian thanks.

"Go and cultivate, break through to the fourth realm as soon as possible, and then let me out. "Tricky Wood Red Dragon Road.

Wow!

Ye Tian left, heading straight for the Nine Swords Cliff in the Five Thousand and One Territory.

......

Five Thousand and One Territory, Nine Swords Cliff.

This treasure land is occupied by the three overlord-level extradimensional forces of the Five Thousand Territory, namely the Tianxuan Sword Alliance, the Burning Flame Mountain, and the Nine Fox Clan, all of which have the existence of the Fourth Realm, and there is more than one, and their strength is similar to that of the Blazing Sun Palace.

However, the major overlord-level superdimensional forces all have their own treasures and opportunities, and they don't care about the Nine Swords Cliff.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Nine Swords Cliff, but he didn't copy his body with his true body, but casually copied the copy body of the third realm transcendent realm that he had killed in the past, and came here as the other party.

Immediately, Ye Tian revealed his identity and took out the token of the Nine Swords Realm Lord.

The news quickly reached the ears of the upper echelons of these three hegemon-level forces.

"A third realm holding the Nine Swords Realm Lord Token said that he was the descendant of the Nine Swords Realm Lord and wanted to enter the Nine Swords Cliff, what should I do now?"

"Do you want to stop it?"

"No, although the Nine Swords Realm Lord has fallen, his six disciples are still alive, and they have reached the peak realm of the Fourth Realm, and their strength is extremely terrifying, if the news spreads and offends the Nine Swords Realm Lord's lineage, it will undoubtedly not do us any good. "

"Let him in, but he can only comprehend a hundred extradimensional eras, this is the limit, and he will not be allowed to enter after that!"

"Well, so be it, anyway, let him comprehend a hundred extradimensional eras, there is nothing to lose us. As for wanting to meditate for a longer period of time, that's impossible. This place is already occupied by us, and that is our territory. "

"That's right, giving him a hundred extradimensional epoch time is to give face to the fallen Nine Sword Realm Master, and there is no need to give him face!"

After these high-level officials discussed this, they gave the order to go down.

......

"One hundred extradimensional epoch time!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that these three forces would give themselves a hundred extradimensional epochs to comprehend, maybe for the general third realm, what is the use of just a hundred extradimensional eras?

But for him, a hundred extradimensional epochs is already a lot of time, enough to make his extradimensional rule realm skyrocket.

"These three forces have underestimated me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Instantly, he entered the Nine Swords Cliff Eternal under the leadership of a Third Realm.

The Nine Swords Cliff is wrapped in a large number of extra-dimensional formations, and it is very tightly guarded, many extra-dimensional realms guard here, and they will not leave for countless years, and it is almost impossible to sneak here.

Even if Ye Tian can copy other people's copy bodies, he is not sure that he will be able to sneak in, and there is a high probability that he will be broken.

Even if he has the fourth-level Great Realm Armor Technique, once he can't calculate it, it proves that there is a problem!

Therefore, it is undoubtedly the best way to be able to use the Nine Swords Token to come in this time.

Soon.

He successfully entered the Nine Swords Cliff.
